title: Flea Treatment in Pelham Bay, Bronx | $350 - $650
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Pelham Bay, Bronx. Effective flea extermination for homes and apartments. Licensed experts. Call today for $350 - $650 treatment!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Pelham Bay home? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout Pelham Bay and the surrounding Bronx neighborhoods. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to eliminate fleas at all life stages, ensuring your family and pets can enjoy a flea-free environment.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Pelham Bay residents for years with fast, effective flea treatments tailored to the unique needs of Bronx homes and apartments. Our licensed technicians understand the challenges of flea infestations in this area and use EPA-approved products that are safe for your family and pets while delivering guaranteed results.
localContext: From the co-ops and single-family homes near Pelham Bay Park to the apartment buildings along Westchester Avenue, flea problems can affect any property in this waterfront neighborhood. Our team is familiar with the local housing stock and knows how to address flea infestations in everything from older walk-ups to newer residential complexes near the Pelham Bay Park subway station.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Pelham Bay?
faqs.answer: Our flea treatment services in Pelham Bay range from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your home, the severity of the infestation, and whether multiple treatments are needed. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: You'll typically see a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours after treatment. However, because flea eggs can continue hatching for up to two weeks, complete elimination usually takes 2-3 weeks. We often recommend a follow-up treatment to ensure all life stages are eliminated.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for both pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and children out of treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces are dry. Our technicians will provide specific safety instructions based on the products used in your home.

faqs.question: Do I need to prepare my Pelham Bay home before flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, preparation is essential for effective treatment. We recommend vacuuming all carpets and upholstery, washing pet bedding in hot water, and removing pets during treatment. Our technicians will provide a detailed preparation checklist when scheduling your appointment to ensure the best results.
